scenario: workplace anxiety before a critical performance review

turns.user_message: So I have this review coming up at work and I know I should be preparing for it but instead I'm just paralyzed with worry.
Yeah... I guess what I mean is, this thing with workplace anxiety before a critical performance review is never going to get better.

Yeah. And what makes it harder is that nobody around me seems to understand.
